short-bio: I am a product designer, specialist in design systems and author of the book Design System beyond the layout. I currently work at Locaweb as a Senior Product Designer, helping to build the Locaweb Design System and promoting the design culture within the company.
about-1: Mateus Villain is product designer, born in Criciúma, Santa Catarina. Graduated in Design by UniSatc, and postgraduate in Digital Product Management by FIAP, he has been working with digital products since 2016.
about-2: Currently, he is a Senior Product Designer at Locaweb, where he is responsible for the brand's design system, having worked on the restructuring of design tokens to support the multi-brand strategy, sharing the design system with KingHost, a company in the same segment as Locaweb within the LWSA group.
about-3: Besides his work at Locaweb, Mateus is a professor, having taught a series of courses, mentorships and workshops. Only at Alura, he has impacted more than 15,000 students with content such as design systems, UX, UI, accessibility, research and writing.
about-4: He is the author of the book Design System beyond the layout: Creation, strategy and governance, published by Casa do Código in 2025, which covers everything from initial planning, style and token definition, to components, microinteractions, and documentation, showing how multidisciplinary teams can work efficiently.
about-5: In addition, he is one of the organizers responsible for Detach!, the first Brazilian event about design system and design at scale, which brings together professionals from product, design and engineering to share knowledge and experiences.
about-6: Outside of these activities, Mateus works on building an open-source design system called Let's UI, a multi-brand design system focused on fluid spacing.
tab-lives-podcasts-description: I occasionally participate in live streams and podcasts about design and technology, sharing my experiences and insights. You can check out some of them below.
tab-training-courses-description: Since 2022, I have been actively involved in the education sector, sharing knowledge in design systems, UX, UI, accessibility, research, and writing.
tab-lectures-workshops-description: I consider myself a very communicative person. I enjoy talking, conversing, and sharing ideas and experiences. Much of this comes through the talks I give at events.
locaweb-title: Restructuring the design tokens of Locaweb
locaweb-description: Understanding the actual tokens system problems and solving creating a new design tokens library.
letsui-title: Let's UI: a multibranding design system with a focus on fluidity
letsui-description: Let’s UI is a complete, open-source multibranding design system, created to make interfaces fully fluid.
book-description: This book covers everything from initial planning, style and token definition, to components, microinteractions, and documentation, showing how multidisciplinary teams can work efficiently.
tools-accessories-keyboard: EPOMAKER x AULA F75 mechanical keyboard
